meta.title: The Case for Vertical-Specific OT Cybersecurity Solutions
meta.description:
Most of the OT cybersecurity solutions are designed and sold to address the near full set of industry segments. Power, water, manufacturing, maritime, rail, petrochem, ... Would an OT cybersecurity solution tailored for a specific sector be a better approach? Miki Shifman believes the answer is yes and makes his case in this session. 

He aims to explore the importance of detailed industry based context and rich data fidelity as key criteria in the evolution of operational technology (OT) security and how this is only possible with vertical industry specialization using rail and maritime as examples and highlighting the unique characteristics that differentiate these vertical industries.
